type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Annual ethylene glycol usage quantities are typically just below the 10T reporting threshold. As a result, reporting status is typically selected as voluntary.  The MPO threshold can be exceeded if ethylene glycol is purchased for replacement in the glycol system. In 2011, ethylene glycol was purchased.  As a result, the total MPO quantity exceeded the 10T reporting threshold for 2011 and the reporting status is listed as "Yes" - the reporting criteria specified in the Canada Gazette notice was met.

comments.comment: No disposal in 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Ammonia emissions are ~9% higher than 2018 due to venting that occurred during startup following the planned shutdown.
In addition, typical year to year variations in trace quantities in industrial wastewater (<2 ppm) will result in minor variations in total emissions. Wastewater is batch discharged as needed.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time
reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Des activités ont été mises en oeuvre lors d'une année précédente; des activités supplémentaires sont soit inutiles ou irréalisables actuellement
